title: Opening for Store Manager at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates!
